name: Spicy Brussel Sprouts with Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy, nonreactive skillet, heat oil over moderately high heat for about 30 seconds.
2. Add almonds and mustard seeds, cumin seeds, and fennel seeds to the skillet. Cook, stirring, until nuts and spices are fragrant and dark, approximately 15 seconds.
3. Reduce the heat to moderate. Add Brussels sprouts, cayenne pepper, and ginger to the skillet. Continue cooking and stirring until vegetables are heated through and spices are well distributed, about 4 minutes.
4. If the vegetables appear dry, add a few tablespoons of water. Season with up to 1 tablespoon of lime juice and salt to taste before serving hot.
